image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: What if I told you your heart has secret gates?
Context visual: Heart valves control blood flow, ensuring it moves in the right direction. But how do they do this?
Escalation visual: There are four main valves: tricuspid, pulmonary, mitral, and aortic. Each plays a critical role.
Evidence visual: They open and close with each heartbeat, preventing backflow. But what happens when they malfunction?
Payoff visual: Valve diseases can lead to serious health issues. Monitoring your heart health is essential!
Cta visual: Curious about how to keep your heart healthy? Follow for more insights!
